file.content:
class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

file.content:
require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "show" do
    get room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    assert_response :success
  end

  test "update involvement sends turbo update when becoming visible and when going invisible" do
    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 1 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "invisible" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "invisible" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end

    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 2 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "invisible", to: "everything" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "everything" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update changing visible states" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update for direct rooms" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_david_and_jason).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "nothing" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason)), params: { involvement: "nothing" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason))
    end
    end
  end

  test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
    sign_in :jz

    assert_changes -> { memberships(:jz_designers).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    end
  end
end

class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

tool_use_result.originalFile:
class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    if @membership.involvement.in?(Membership.involvements.keys) && params[:involvement].in?(Membership.involvements.keys)
      @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

      broadcast_visibility_changes
      redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
    else
      redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room), alert: t(".invalid_involvement")
    end
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

content.text: All existing tests pass. Let me write a quick manual check for the invalid-value case to confirm behavior, then run the full test suite as the CLAUDE.md proof-before-claiming-success rule requires.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/invalid_involvement_test.rb << 'EOF'
require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerInvalidTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "invalid involvement value does not update membership and redirects with alert" do
    assert_no_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement } do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "bogus" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
      assert_equal I18n.t("rooms.involvements.update.invalid_involvement"), flash[:alert]
    end
  end
end
EOF

content.text:
Change complete and left uncommitted, as requested.

**What changed:**
- `app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb` — `update` now validates `params[:involvement]` against `Membership.involvements.keys` before updating. Valid values proceed exactly as before (update, broadcast, redirect). Invalid values skip the update/broadcast and redirect back to the involvement page with `alert: t(".invalid_involvement")`.
- `config/locales/en.yml` — added `en.rooms.involvements.update.invalid_involvement` message.

**Proof:**
- `bin/rails test test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb` → `5 runs, 36 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips`.
- Added a temporary regression test locally (`put ... involvement: "bogus"`) confirming the membership is unchanged, the redirect still targets the involvement page, and `flash[:alert]` equals the new I18n string — passed, then removed the scratch file (not part of the requested diff).
- `bundle exec rake test` → `245 runs, 712 assertions, 0 failures, 1 errors, 0 skips`. The 1 error is `Message::AttachmentTest#test_creating_a_message_creates_video_preview`, unrelated to this change — a pre-existing environment issue (`ffprobe` failing to load `libjxl.0.11.dylib`, a missing local video-processing dependency). `git diff` confirms only the two files above were touched.

result:
Change complete and left uncommitted, as requested.

**What changed:**
- `app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb` — `update` now validates `params[:involvement]` against `Membership.involvements.keys` before updating. Valid values proceed exactly as before (update, broadcast, redirect). Invalid values skip the update/broadcast and redirect back to the involvement page with `alert: t(".invalid_involvement")`.
- `config/locales/en.yml` — added `en.rooms.involvements.update.invalid_involvement` message.

**Proof:**
- `bin/rails test test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb` → `5 runs, 36 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips`.
- Added a temporary regression test locally (`put ... involvement: "bogus"`) confirming the membership is unchanged, the redirect still targets the involvement page, and `flash[:alert]` equals the new I18n string — passed, then removed the scratch file (not part of the requested diff).
- `bundle exec rake test` → `245 runs, 712 assertions, 0 failures, 1 errors, 0 skips`. The 1 error is `Message::AttachmentTest#test_creating_a_message_creates_video_preview`, unrelated to this change — a pre-existing environment issue (`ffprobe` failing to load `libjxl.0.11.dylib`, a missing local video-processing dependency). `git diff` confirms only the two files above were touched.
